verses.text: A red heifer without blemish is slain outside the camp. Red heifer. A special offering for cleansing.
A red heifer without blemish is slain outside the camp. Red heifer. A special offering for cleansing.
A red heifer without blemish is slain outside the camp. Red heifer. A special offering for cleansing.
A red heifer without blemish is slain outside the camp. Red heifer. A special offering for cleansing.
It is burnt with cedar, hyssop, and scarlet. Burnt. Its ashes will purify.
It is burnt with cedar, hyssop, and scarlet. Burnt. Its ashes will purify.
It is burnt with cedar, hyssop, and scarlet. Burnt. Its ashes will purify.
It is burnt with cedar, hyssop, and scarlet. Burnt. Its ashes will purify.
The ashes are kept for the water of separation. The ashes. Cleansing is stored up.
The ashes are kept for the water of separation. The ashes. Cleansing is stored up.
He that touches a dead body is unclean seven days. Defiled. Death pollutes.
He that touches a dead body is unclean seven days. Defiled. Death pollutes.
He that touches a dead body is unclean seven days. Defiled. Death pollutes.
Whoever is in a death-tent, or touches a grave, is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches far.
Whoever is in a death-tent, or touches a grave, is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches far.
Whoever is in a death-tent, or touches a grave, is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches far.
The ashes in running water are sprinkled on the unclean. Sprinkled. The water cleanses the defiled.
The ashes in running water are sprinkled on the unclean. Sprinkled. The water cleanses the defiled.
The ashes in running water are sprinkled on the unclean. Sprinkled. The water cleanses the defiled.
He that is not purified is cut off. Cut off. The unclean must be cleansed.
He that is not purified is cut off. Cut off. The unclean must be cleansed.
